subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The glance of God's loving-kindness hath been directed towards thee from the Prison, and with the tongue of grandeur He calleth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی لحاظ عنایت حق از شطر سجن بتو توجه نموده و بلسان عظمت ترا ندا مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
